name: lark-mcp-on-agentcore-infra
comment:overrides: Pin transitive dev-only deps to patched versions to clear advisories without a vitest major bump. CDK build/test-time only; never enters the production container. NOTE: brace-expansion (GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2, moderate) is bundled inside aws-cdk-lib (inBundle:true via minimatch) and CANNOT be overridden — it clears only when aws-cdk-lib ships a rebuilt bundle. Risk is build-time glob over our own files, not untrusted input.
